texto: Do you see the labyrinth out there?" She waved a graceful hand toward the garden. "Life is like that labyrinth, full of pathways that seem like the right way, but end up being detours. We go one way and then another until we find our true path.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Belinda M. Gordon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Do you see the labyrinth out there?"
